question: Comment gerer les taches planifiees dans un backend ?

principles.text: @Scheduled natif Spring + registre monitoring. Quartz uniquement si clustering. ShedLock si multi-instance. Jamais cron OS.

sources.name: Spring Boot 4.0.3 Task Scheduling
sources.quote: @Scheduled provides declarative task scheduling with cron, fixedRate, and fixedDelay

sources.name: SWEBOK v4 Software Maintenance
sources.quote: Automated maintenance tasks require monitoring and observability

sources.name: Spring Boot Actuator /scheduledtasks
sources.quote: Actuator endpoint exposes all scheduled tasks with their triggers and intervals

python-django.text: Celery Beat ou django-crontab pour taches planifiees Django.
